memoryArtifacts.headline: Rebecca's ancestors
memoryArtifacts.description:
A long time ago, in a land faraway, the groundwork was being established for Reformation of the Gospel, this is the story of two of our ancestors who helped.

Looking back in time, the Cranmer family …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Cranmer Archdeacon of Canterbury於1491年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾阿斯洛可頓時，他的父親Thomas Cranmer37歲，母親Agnes Hatfielde27歲。他於1534年與Alice Ann Sands在英國英格蘭貝德福爾盧頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1571年4月20日在德國享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Cranmer Archdeacon of Canterbury于1491年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾阿斯洛可頓时，他的父亲Thomas Cranmer37岁，母亲Agnes Hatfielde27岁。他于1534年与Alice Ann Sands在英国英格兰貝德福爾盧頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1571年4月20日在德国享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cranmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Cranmer Green in Walsham le Willows (Suffolk), and perhaps also from other places similarly named, such as Cranmer Hall in Sculthorpe (Norfolk), Cranmore in Shalfleet (Isle of Wight), Cranmer Bottom in Selborne and Cranmore in Aldershot (both Hampshire), and East and West Cranmore (Somerset), all named from Old English cran ‘crane’ + mere ‘lake, pool’ or mōr ‘moor, marshy ground’. See also Cranmore , with which there may have been some confusion.

variants.name: Cranmore
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Cranmer  .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Cranmer Archdeacon of Canterbury was born in 1491, in Aslockton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Cranmer, was 37 and his mother, Agnes Hatfielde, was 27. He married Alice Ann Sands in 1534, in Luton, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 20 April 1571, in Germany, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Cranmer Archdeacon of Canterbury est né en 1491, à Aslockton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Cranmer, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes Hatfielde, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Alice Ann Sands en 1534, à Luton, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 20 avril 1571, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Cranmer Archdeacon of Canterbury 1491 in Aslockton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Cranmer 37 und seine Mutter Agnes Hatfielde 27. Er hat 1534 in Luton, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Ann Sands geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 20. April 1571 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Cranmer Archdeacon of Canterbury è nato il nel 1491 nel Aslockton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Cranmer, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Hatfielde, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Alice Ann Sands nel 1534, nel Luton, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 aprile 1571, nel Germania, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Cranmer Archdeacon of Canterburyが1491年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアスロクトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Cranmerは37歳，母Agnes Hatfieldeは27歳であった。1534年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアルトンでAlice Ann Sandsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1571年4月20日にドイツで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Cranmer Archdeacon of Canterbury(이)가 1491년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아슬록턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Cranmer(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Hatfielde(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1534년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 루턴에서 Alice Ann Sands(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 4월 20일 독일에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Cranmer Archdeacon of Canterbury nasceu em 1491, em Aslockton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Cranmer, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Hatfielde, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Ann Sands em 1534, em Luton, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de abril de 1571, em Alemanha, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Cranmer Archdeacon of Canterbury родился в 1491 г. в местности аслокктон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Cranmer было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Hatfielde, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Ann Sands в 1534 г. в местности лутон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 20 апреля 1571 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Cranmer Archdeacon of Canterbury nació en 1491, en Aslockton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Cranmer, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Agnes Hatfielde, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alice Ann Sands en 1534, en Luton, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de abril de 1571, en Alemania, a la edad de 80 años.
